title: Smoky Callaloo Skewers
description: A flavorful and healthy vegan dish featuring smoky callaloo, perfect for grilling.
instructions: 1. Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
2. In a large bowl, whisk together argentinian seasoning blend, intense smoked paprika, salt, and pepper.
3. Add the callaloo to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
4. Thread the marinated callaloo onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
5. Brush the skewers with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
6. Grill the skewers for 3-4 minutes per side, or until the callaloo is tender.
7. Serve the skewers hot with a squeeze of lemon juice.
